rationale: The only substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's inline comment questioning whether reduce_scatter verification is complete in the new test assertions) is missed entirely by X, which mostly issues high-confidence 'PASS' verifications and one vague documentation nit. Y independently surfaces the closely related gap that _TP lacks the device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions given to _PCP/_DP/_EP, directly echoing the reviewer's concern with a concrete, actionable fix. Y's five findings are all grounded in the diff/upstream code (verified via explicit file:line evidence) and each specifies a concrete file/line and change, giving it much higher actionability than X's mostly narrative pass/fail table; X's grounding is solid but its single comment is softer and less specific.
